title: FAMILIES FIRST PROGRAM - 211info
text: BETHLEHEM INN FAMILIES FIRST PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides short-term shelter stays for an average of 5 weeks. Services available to residents include meals, case management services, laundry facilities, access to personal hygiene and clothing, and referrals to outside community resources. Children will be allowed to maintain enrollment at their current school providing it is within the service area. 20363 Mervin Sampels Road Bend, OR 97703 Eligibility: Families with children under age 18 who meet all of the following requirements: -Must pass drug test (drug/alcohol testing during intake and at random) -Must not have a registered sex offense -School-aged children must be enrolled in school While pets are not allowed, reasonable accommodations will be made for service animals. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week; must check in by 5:30pm Email (541) 322-8768 13 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 322-8768 ext 13 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment. No walk-ins will be accepted; must call first to make intake appointment. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Across the street from ODOT and the DMV Services: Transitional Housing/Shelter * Homeless Families Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - NEXT STEPS ADULT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BETHLEHEM INN
